since_last: 95% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.99%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 95% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.49% · BTC +1.15% · Gold +3.91% · Nasdaq100 +2.61%. 95% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.99%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.99%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SOUN is the standout at +10.22%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.57% at $169.92
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.57% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
